User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user of the DineFlow Global platform, including customers, restaurant administrators, and super administrators. Links to Firebase Authentication for credentials.

id.description: Unique identifier for the User entity.

email.description: The user's email address, used for login and notifications.

name.description: The full name of the user.

role.description: The role of the user within the platform (e.g., 'SuperAdmin', 'RestaurantAdmin', 'Customer').

restaurantId.description: Reference to the Restaurant this user is an admin for. This field is only applicable and required for users with the 'RestaurantAdmin' role. (Relationship: Restaurant 1:1 User for RestaurantAdmin role)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the user account was last updated.

Restaurant.title: Restaurant
Restaurant.description: Represents a restaurant managed on the DineFlow Global platform, including its details, localization, and SEO settings.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Restaurant entity.

name.description: The official name of the restaurant.

description.description: A brief description of the restaurant.

address.description: The physical address of the restaurant.

contactEmail.description: The primary contact email for the restaurant.

contactPhone.description: The primary contact phone number for the restaurant.

baseLanguage.description: The primary language used for the restaurant's operations and content (e.g., 'en', 'fr').

baseCurrency.description: The primary currency used for pricing and transactions (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR').

seoMetaTags.description: JSON string or similar representation for dynamic meta tags to enhance local SEO.

seoSchemaMarkup.description: JSON string or similar representation for schema.org 'LocalBusiness' markup to enhance local SEO.

localizedUrlSlugs.description: An array of localized URL slugs for the restaurant (e.g., '/uk/london/pizzeria').

adminUserId.description: Reference to the User who is the primary administrator for this restaurant. (Relationship: Restaurant 1:1 User)

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the restaurant was onboarded to the platform.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the restaurant details were last updated.

Menu.title: Menu
Menu.description: Represents a menu offered by a restaurant, containing a collection of menu items.

id.description: Unique identifier for the Menu entity.

restaurantId.description: Reference to the Restaurant this menu belongs to. (Relationship: Restaurant 1:N Menu)

name.description: The name of the menu (e.g., 'Lunch Menu', 'Dinner Menu', 'Drinks').

description.description: A brief description of the menu.

isActive.description: Indicates if the menu is currently active and visible to customers.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the menu was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the menu was last updated.

MenuItem.title: MenuItem
MenuItem.description: Represents an individual food or drink item available on a restaurant's menu.

id.description: Unique identifier for the MenuItem entity.

menuId.description: Reference to the Menu this item belongs to. (Relationship: Menu 1:N MenuItem)

name.description: The name of the menu item.

description.description: A detailed description of the menu item, including ingredients.

price.description: The price of the menu item.

currency.description: The currency of the menu item's price (e.g., 'USD', 'EUR'). Defaults to restaurant's base currency.

inventoryLevel.description: The current stock level for this menu item, for real-time inventory management.

category.description: The category the item belongs to (e.g., 'Appetizer', 'Main Course', 'Dessert').

imageUrl.description: URL to an image of the menu item.

isAvailable.description: Indicates if the menu item is currently available for order.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the menu item was created.

updatedAt.description: Timestamp when the menu item was last updated.

DesignConfig.title: DesignConfig
DesignConfig.description: Stores the visual design and layout settings for a restaurant's storefront.

definition.description: Stores styling and layout configurations for the restaurant storefront.
